title: Lead Frontend Developer at Infosys Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Lead Frontend Developer at Infosys Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Infosys Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Infosys Advisory Limited:
Infosys Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Infosys Advisory Limited!
